title: Copper Cutting
description: Use the stonecutter to craft all types of copper doors and trapdoors.
body:
Use the stonecutter to transform exposed, weathered and oxidized copper blocks (and their waxed versions) into their respective doors and trapdoors. Get five doors per copper block and four trapdoors. 

### notblue's Metallurgy Packs
- [Anvil Repair](https://modrinth.com/datapack/anvil-repair)
- [Copper Cutting](https://modrinth.com/datapack/copper-cutting)
- [Better Copper Recycling](https://modrinth.com/datapack/copper-recycling)
- [Cheaper Clocks](https://modrinth.com/datapack/cheaper-clocks)
- [Better Gold Recycling](https://modrinth.com/datapack/better-gold-recycling)
- [Cheaper Compasses](https://modrinth.com/datapack/cheaper-compasses)
- [Better Iron Recycling](https://modrinth.com/datapack/better-iron-recycling)
